---

## Summary of Changes in `src/` Directory

### 1. **Renaming: "Tests" → "LLM Evaluation"**
The feature previously called "Tests" has been rebranded to "LLM Evaluation" across multiple files:

| File | Change |
|------|--------|
| `src/app/login/page.tsx` | Tab label changed from "Text to text" → "LLM Evaluation" |
| `src/app/tests/page.tsx` | Page header changed from "Tests" → "LLM Evaluation", subtitle updated to "Create and manage tests to evaluate your LLM" |
| `src/components/AppLayout.tsx` | Sidebar nav item label changed from "Tests" → "LLM Evaluation" |

---

### 2. **Navigation Restructure** (`src/components/AppLayout.tsx`)
- **Reordered nav items**: "LLM Evaluation" moved up in the sidebar, now appears before TTS and STT
- **Added new "Resources" section**: Contains a "Documentation" link that opens `https://penseapp.vercel.app/docs` in a new tab (with external link icon)

---

### 3. **Hidden Toggle Button** (`src/components/agent-tabs/InbuiltToolsPanel.tsx`)
- The toggle switch button for inbuilt tools now has a `hidden` attribute, effectively hiding it from the UI

---

### 4. **Code Formatting / Linting Fixes**
Multiple files have trailing commas added for consistent code style (likely from Prettier/ESLint):
- `src/app/tests/page.tsx`
- `src/app/tools/page.tsx`  
- `src/components/ToolPicker.tsx`
- `src/components/agent-tabs/ToolsTabContent.tsx`
- `src/components/AddTestDialog.tsx`
- `src/components/agent-tabs/InbuiltToolsPanel.tsx` (also has a formatting fix for the `<h3>` element)

---

### Key Highlights
1. **User-facing label change**: "Tests" → "LLM Evaluation" throughout the app
2. **New documentation link** added to sidebar navigation under "Resources"
3. **Inbuilt tools toggle is now hidden** in the agent tools panel
4. **Navigation reordering**: LLM Evaluation is now more prominent in the sidebar

                  "content": "   - Use &#96;window.history.replaceState&#96; to update URL without navigation side effects (avoids title reset issues caused by &#96;router.push&#96;)"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1066,
                  "content": "2. **Sidebar Panels**: Slide-in panels for create/edit forms"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1102,
                  "content": "10. **Native Link Navigation**: List items use Next.js &#96;&lt;Link&gt;&#96; components for browser-native right-click support"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1111,
                  "content": "      - **In-progress runs** (&#96;pending&#96;/&#96;queued&#96;/&#96;in_progress&#96;): Initializes tests as \"running\" (yellow), polls API at &#96;POLLING_INTERVAL_MS&#96; until complete"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1127,
                  "content": "      - &#96;tests&#96;: Array converted from &#96;pastRun.results&#96; to show test names while loading (TestRunnerDialog only)"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1149,
                  "content": "    - Used for: clicking past run rows in Tests tab to view historical results"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1245,
                  "content": "├── mint.json              # Navigation, theme, and site configuration"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1255,
                  "content": "│   ├── llm-testing.mdx   # LLM testing (agent, tools, tests, benchmarks)"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1260,
                  "content": "### Navigation Groups (mint.json)"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1272,
                  "content": "| **Agents**      | Create, configure (system prompt, STT/TTS/LLM), update, duplicate, delete agents. Covers all tabs: Agent, Tools, Data Extraction, Tests, Settings                                                |"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1279,
                  "content": "| **LLM Testing** | Complete workflow: create agent → create tool → attach tool → create Next Reply test → run test → create Tool Invocation test → run test → attach tests to agent → run all tests → run benchmark |"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1285,
                  "content": "- &#96;&lt;Card&gt;&#96; / &#96;&lt;CardGroup&gt;&#96; - Navigation cards"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1318,
                  "content": "  --sidebar-width: 260px;"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1532,
                  "content": "End-to-end tests combining:"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1565,
                  "content": "| Tests           | &#96;GET/POST /tests&#96;, &#96;GET/PUT/DELETE /tests/{uuid}&#96;                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1566,
                  "content": "| Agent Tests     | &#96;GET /agent-tests/agent/{uuid}/tests&#96;, &#96;GET /agent-tests/agent/{uuid}/runs&#96;, &#96;POST/DELETE /agent-tests&#96;, &#96;POST /agent-tests/agent/{uuid}/run&#96;, &#96;GET /agent-tests/run/{taskId}&#96;, &#96;POST /agent-tests/agent/{uuid}/benchmark&#96;, &#96;GET /agent-tests/benchmark/{taskId}&#96; |"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1635,
                  "content": "The &#96;GET /agent-tests/agent/{uuid}/runs&#96; endpoint returns test run history:"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1646,
                  "content": "      \"total_tests\": 2,"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1672,
                  "content": "- &#96;total_tests&#96;: Number of tests in the run (used to display \"N tests\" for unit tests)"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1682,
                  "content": "The &#96;GET /agent-tests/benchmark/{taskId}&#96; endpoint returns intermediate results during &#96;in_progress&#96; status:"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1693,
                  "content": "      \"total_tests\": 2,"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1709,
                  "content": "      \"total_tests\": null,"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1886,
                  "content": "// BackHeader - for detail pages with back navigation"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1983,
                  "content": "  TestStats,"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2004,
                  "content": "&lt;TestStats passedCount={5} failedCount={2} /&gt;"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2103,
                  "content": "| **Tests**                     | &#96;[1fr_1fr_auto]&#96;                          | Equal-width name and type columns                             |"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2131,
                  "content": "Async operations (simulations, tests, benchmarks, STT/TTS evaluations) follow this status flow:"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2148,
                  "content": "For batch operations (e.g., running multiple tests), track both:"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2215,
                  "content": "- &#96;src/components/agent-tabs/TestsTabContent.tsx&#96; - Background polling for past runs"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2236,
                  "content": "**Files using &#96;POLLING_INTERVAL_MS&#96;:** TestRunnerDialog, BenchmarkResultsDialog (with intermediate results support), TestsTabContent, STT/TTS evaluation pages, simulation run page."
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2255,
                  "content": "LIMITS.TESTS_MAX_RUN_ALL; // 20 - max tests for \"Run all tests\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2290,
                  "content": "- Tests tab: \"Run all tests\" button"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2343,
                  "content": "// If you need to intercept navigation (e.g., for callback-based navigation):"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2347,
                  "content": "    if (onNavigateToItem) {"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2349,
                  "content": "      onNavigateToItem(item.id);"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2362,
                  "content": "- Proper accessibility (keyboard navigation, screen readers)"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2434,
                  "content": "## Navigation Structure"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2436,
                  "content": "### Sidebar Sections"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2442,
                  "content": "2. **Unit Tests**"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2444,
                  "content": "   - Text to Text (route: &#96;/tests&#96;)"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2447,
                  "content": "3. **End-to-End Tests**"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2456,
                  "content": "### External Links in Sidebar"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2458,
                  "content": "The sidebar navigation handles external links differently from internal routes. In &#96;AppLayout.tsx&#96;, items with &#96;id === \"docs\"&#96; render as &#96;&lt;a&gt;&#96; tags with &#96;target=\"_blank\"&#96; instead of Next.js &#96;&lt;Link&gt;&#96; components. External links include a small arrow icon (↗) to indicate they open in a new tab."
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2519,
                  "content": "  - For simulation runs, a special &#96;notFoundHeader&#96; is used that shows empty header and navigates back to &#96;/simulations&#96; (main page) instead of the specific simulation"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2525,
                  "content": "- **Multiple date formats**: When creating optimistic UI updates (e.g., adding a pending run to a table), use &#96;new Date().toISOString()&#96; which produces &#96;\"2026-01-18T09:30:00.000Z\"&#96;. The &#96;formatRelativeTime&#96; helper in &#96;TestsTabContent.tsx&#96; handles both formats - check if the string already has a timezone indicator before appending \"Z\" to avoid invalid dates like &#96;\"...ZZ\"&#96; which produce NaN"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2537,
                  "content": "  - Example: &#96;TestsTabContent&#96; uses &#96;viewingTestResultsRef&#96;, &#96;viewingBenchmarkResultsRef&#96;, &#96;selectedPastRunRef&#96;, and &#96;pastRunsRef&#96; to check current state inside polling callbacks"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2542,
                  "content": "  - Example: &#96;TestsTabContent&#96; uses &#96;pastRunsRef&#96; instead of having &#96;pastRuns&#96; in the polling useEffect dependencies"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2665,
                  "content": "### Navigation"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2669,
                  "content": "- **Back navigation**: Detail pages include back button to list view"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2673,
                  "content": "Page titles use a **two-layer approach** for correct display on both reload and client navigation:"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2676,
                  "content": "2. **&#96;useEffect&#96; in pages** (client-side): Update titles for dynamic content and client navigation"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2706,
                  "content": "| &#96;/tests&#96;                   | \"Tests \\| Pense\"                                          |"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2739,
                  "content": "| &#96;/agents/[uuid]&#96;                   | &#96;&lt;Agent Name&gt; - &lt;Tab Name&gt; \\| Pense&#96; (e.g., \"My Agent - Tests \\| Pense\")     |"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2768,
                  "content": "For tab changes in &#96;/agents/[uuid]&#96; and &#96;/simulations/[uuid]&#96;, &#96;window.history.replaceState&#96; is used instead of &#96;router.push&#96; to update the URL without triggering navigation side effects that could reset the title:"
                }
              ]
            }
          ],
